---
title: "Supplemental Online Materials (S5): Summary of Extra-Pair Attraction Models"
author: ""
date: 2025-11-12 #date of initial start (Y, M, D)
format: 
  # html:
  #     code-fold: true #allows the code to be collapsed
  #     embed-resources: true #for html documents to save with formatting
  #     output-file: s3_raw_hormones_analyses.html
    pdf:
      toc: false #include table of contents
      number-sections: true
      mainfont: "Times New Roman"
      monofont: "Courier New" #for console/code output
      code-block-border-left: false
      code-block-font-size: 0.9em
      code-block-bg: true #remove grey background from codeblocks
      code-overflow: wrap #enable wrapping of long lines
      code-line-numbers: true
      keep-tex: true
      highlight-style: kate #turns off light-grey highlighting of code
      pdf-engine: lualatex
knitr: 
  opts_chunk: 
    comment: NA #"#>"
    collapse: false #false for pdf 
execute:
  cache: true #this saves each code chunk so you don't need to re-run it. If you have chunks that depend upon each other this can be dangerous though. Use "dependson" 
  echo: true #do I want to display the code chunk? 
  results: true #do I want to display the output? 
  include: true #do I want to include the code and code output? 
  warning: false #do I want to display warnings from R about the analysis? 
  eval: true #do I want to evaluate this chunk? 
#params allow for rendering of specific chunks in output
params:  
  loading_data: 
    value: true
  functions:
    value: true
  
---


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: false

rm(list = ls())

# load in my file to easily link all of the relevant model image 
image_links <- readRDS("../../output/data_appendix_output/qmd_png_file_links.rds")
#image_links

#source in my model lists to have selection vectors 
source("part_sex_attract_model_list.R")

#source in the unique helper function for printing models 
source("../processing_scripts/helper_functions.R")

```



![](../../output/results/fp_ep_ea_sc_fig.png)




```{r}
#| results: 'asis'
#| echo: false

supplemental_sections1 <- list(
  section_1 = list(m = c("EA_PRCPSMSy", "EA_HPSMSy"), #full models
                   title = "Full preregistered models reported in manuscript"),
  
  section_2 = list(m = c("EA_PRCPSM", "EA_HPSM"), #remove study 
                   title = "Removing study terms from full preregistered models"),
  
  section_3 = list(m = c("EA_PRCPSSy", "EA_HPSSy"), #remove between-woman 
                   title = "Removing between-woman terms from full preregistered models"),
  
  section_4 = list(m = c("EA_PRCPS", "EA_HPS"), #remove study and between-woman 
                   title = "Removing both study and between-woman terms from the full preregistered models"),
  
  section_5 = list(m = c("EA_PRCPSMs1", "EA_HPSMs1", #separate study 1 and study 2 models 
                 "EA_PRCPSMs2", "EA_HPSMs2"),
                   title = "Full preregistered models analyzed by study separately"),

  section_6 = list(m = c("EA_PRCPMSy", "EA_HPMSy"), #remove self
                   title = "Removing self sexual attractiveness from full preregistered models"),
  
  section_7 = list(m = c("EA_PRCP", "EA_HP"), #basic model
                   title = "Only including partner sexual attractiveness and its interactions"),
  
  section_8 = list(m = c("EA_RHPSMSy"),#raw hormone analysis with full models 
                   title = "Raw hormone analysis with full models")
)

for (i in seq_along(supplemental_sections1)) {

  #extract section name 
  sec_i_name <- names(supplemental_sections1[i])
 
  #extract models 
  models <- supplemental_sections1[[sec_i_name]]$m
  
  #extract title 
  title <- supplemental_sections1[[sec_i_name]]$title
  
  section <- supplemental_sections1[[i]] #grab section 
  models  <- section$m #grab model 
  title   <- section$title #grab title 

  
  
 cat(paste0("\n# Section 5.", i, " ", title, "\n\n"))
  
    for (m in models) {
      cat(paste0("\n## Summary of model: ", m, "\n\n"))
      get_model_imgs(m, image_links, render = TRUE)
      
      # Page break after each model (but skip after the last)
      if (m != tail(models, 1)) cat("\n\n\\newpage\n\n")
    }
  
}


```
